mnemonics: FANBOYS for AND, BUT, OR, NOT, FOR, YET, SO
King Philip Came Over For Good Spaghetti
keyPoints: AND (conjunction): True only if both operands are True
NOT (negation): Reverses the value of the operand
OR (disjunction): True if at least one operand is True
FOR (implication): True if the premise is False or the premise implies the conclusion
YET (contrapositive): Same as NOT (negation) of the converse of the implication
SO (simplification): Equivalent to the conclusion of the implication
